summary: Senior Software Engineer with 10+ years of experience building scalable SaaS platforms, distributed systems, cloud-native applications, and event-driven architectures. Proven track record designing multi-tenant systems, modernizing legacy platforms, and delivering resilient solutions across retail, education, and enterprise domains. Based in Ontario, Canada.

skills.programming: C#, SQL, TypeScript, Linux commands, HTML5+, CSS3+
skills.software: ASP.NET Core, Windows/Background Services, React, Bootstrap
skills.frameworks: Docker/Podman, Self-hosting, AWS, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Docker Registry, Terraform, Grafana
skills.designPatterns: Microservices, Clean Architecture, CQRS, Service-Oriented Architecture (SOA), Domain-Driven Design, Event Sourcing
skills.productivityTools: Keycloak, RabbitMQ, NATS, Redis, Nginx, SEQ, TLS/Let's Encrypt, Axios, Redux, Entity Framework, Git, GitHub Actions
skills.extra: .NET Core SaaS platforms, event-driven architecture, multi-tenant systems, legacy modernization, cloud-to-on-prem integrations, observability, resilience, and DevOps automation

professionalExperience.productName: Retail Solutions Central - RSC (.NET Core 9 | React | DevOps):
projectDescription: Architected and developed a cloud-native retail platform by modernizing a legacy on-prem system into a scalable multi-tenant SaaS solution using .NET Core, React, and PostgreSQL.

Designed an event-driven data pipeline to stream encrypted JSON sales transactions from on-prem systems using Windows services, Polly retry/circuit breaker policies, and RabbitMQ with DLQ for reliable processing.
Built a distributed processing system with sequential queue-based execution, dynamic tenant resolution, and runtime migrations to ensure data consistency and fault-tolerant ingestion.
Implemented multi-tenant architecture supporting database-per-tenant and schema-based isolation, enabling flexible scaling based on subscription tiers.
Developed a React cloud dashboard and retail management system using TypeScript, Redux, EN/FR localization, and Keycloak OAuth2 authentication with realm-based tenancy.
Enabled hybrid cloud-to-on-prem communication using NATS messaging for secure real-time interaction between cloud services and local client systems.
Containerized platform services using Podman/Docker and deployed on Kubernetes with auto-scaling processing services based on queue load.
Automated CI/CD pipelines using self-hosted GitHub Actions and a private Docker registry with environment-specific versioned deployments, rollback capability, and TLS-secured infrastructure.
Implemented observability and resilience strategies using SEQ logging, correlation IDs, circuit breakers, and controlled connection handling to maintain stability under failures.

projectLink.linkDesc: Dashboard access can be shown during interview.

projectDescription: Engineered a .NET Core CMS and backend APIs using event-driven patterns and Rx.NET to support scalable concurrent processing and fault-tolerant behavior.
Built secure REST APIs for authentication, payments, and data synchronization using OAuth2, Entity Framework, and MS SQL Server across web and mobile clients.
Developed a responsive React SPA with Redux for centralized state management, improving frontend performance and API-driven data interactions.
Automated CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins to streamline build, testing, and deployment workflows, reducing manual release effort and improving reliability by approximately 50%.

professionalExperience.productName: Disney BYJU'S Early Learn App (C# | .NET Core 6 | React):
projectDescription: Developed high-scale .NET Core APIs handling 10,000+ requests per minute for subscriptions, session management, and CDN-based content delivery.
Designed a message-driven microservices architecture using RabbitMQ and MongoDB to enable asynchronous communication, scalability, fault tolerance, and service decoupling.
Optimized system performance using Redis caching and parallel processing, reducing server load by approximately 40% and improving response times across distributed services.
Led engineering initiatives including system design, code reviews, and North America deployments, improving delivery quality, team productivity, and business alignment.
Developed Web APIs for mobile applications using .NET Framework and SQL Server to support CDN content, user progress, leaderboards, module updates, subscriptions, and enrollments.
Designed database schemas and implemented N-tier architecture with SOLID principles to improve application performance, scalability, maintainability, and system reliability.
Developed a scalable e-commerce web application using ASP.NET Core MVC, MS SQL Server, Entity Framework, and responsive Bootstrap UI patterns.
Integrated AJAX and JSON-driven interactions with dynamic pages, layouts, view components, and data-driven business workflows.
Integrated Stripe for secure payment processing within the checkout session.
Built a high-fidelity simulation application for Japanese electric scooter maker Okinawa Motors to showcase new models and product features.
Distributed the application to Tamil Nadu Okinawa dealers on iPads and Macs for showroom presentations.
